name: Vocab Quiz (Google Sheets)
description: Vocabulary quiz that pulls flashcard decks from Google Sheets. Teachers create decks in Sheets, students study them here with AI tutoring. Call authorize_google, then load_deck, then next_turn to quiz.

tools.name: authorize_google
tools.description: Connect the student's Google account so the app can read shared Google Sheets. Call ONCE at the start of a session, NEVER again after it returns authorized:true.

tools.name: load_deck
tools.description: Load a flashcard deck from a Google Sheet. The sheet should have columns: Term, Definition, and optionally Hint. Pass the sheet URL or ID. After this succeeds, use next_turn to quiz.

sheetUrl.description: Google Sheets URL or spreadsheet ID

tools.name: next_turn
tools.description: Advance the quiz state machine. Pass {studentAnswer} to submit an answer, {correct} to record your judgment. The response 'state' field tells you what to do next.

studentAnswer.description: The student's answer to the current term.

correct.description: Your judgment: did the student's answer demonstrate understanding of the definition?
